data.title: Netflix's 'Wordle Killer' Coming In November: Can 'Ted Tumblewords' Be The Next Viral Word Game Hit?
data.description: Wordle went viral in 2022 and became the top searched item on Google for the year. Could Netflix's Ted Tumblewords be the next hit word game?

data.title: Cryptocurrency Litecoin Up More Than 3% In 24 hours
data.description: Litecoin's (CRYPTO: LTC) price has increased 3.14% over the past 24 hours to $71.08, which is in the opposite direction of its trend over the past week, where it has experienced a 1.0% loss, moving from $71.94 to its current price.
